Mathew Stephenson, Esq., Kochan & Stephenson (415) 392-6200 for Defendants Kochan and Kochan & Stephenson Opposing Party
RULING:
There are no moving pleadings before the Court; Counsel will submit copies of pertinent pleadings for the Court's consideration. Plaintiff Karen Jew's Motion For New Trial is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
